---
title: "data_exploration"
format: html
---

Load libraries 
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(tmap)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
```

## Import data 
```{r}
plumes <- read.csv(here::here("data", "plumes.csv"))
#world <- read_sf(here::here("data", "gadm_410.gdb"))
scences_2026 <- read_sf(here::here("data", "scenes_2026-02-04T02_01_53.248Z.gpkg"))
sources_2025 <- read_sf(here::here("data", "sources_2025-12-28T21_56_47.135Z.json"))


```

## Clean 
```{r}
# Make sf 
plumes <- st_as_sf(plumes, coords = c('plume_longitude', 'plume_latitude'))
```

Mapping Plumes
```{r}
tm_shape(plumes) + 
  tm_dots()
```

Looking at Sectors emission avg for CO2 and CH4
```{r}
plumes %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  group_by(ipcc_sector, gas) %>% 
  summarise(mean = mean(emission_auto, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% 
  ungroup()
  
```
